nodes.name: Merge: Jina Response + Original RSS Data

parameters.query: ={{ `INSERT INTO ai_news_queue (link, company, title, ai_summary, status) VALUES ('${$json.link.replace(/'/g, "''")}', '${$json.company.replace(/'/g, "''")}', '${$json.title.replace(/'/g, "''")}', '${$json.ai_summary.replace(/'/g, "''")}', 'pending') ON CONFLICT (link) DO NOTHING;` }}
SELECT * FROM ai_news_queue WHERE status = 'pending' ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 1;

main.node: Merge: Jina Response + Original RSS Data
